subtitle.forgot: Get a link to reset your password

teamName.label: Team name
teamName.help: 3-30 characters — this becomes your in-game team name

managerName.label: Manager name
managerName.help: Your name as manager — shown on your team profile

email.label: Email
email.forgotHelp: We'll send a secure reset link to this email.

switch.login: Already have an account? Log in

error.teamNameTooShort: Team name must be at least 3 characters
error.managerNameTooShort: Manager name must be at least 2 characters
error.teamNameTaken: That team name is already taken — pick another
error.bootstrapFailed: Account created, but the team could not be initialised: {detail}
error.sessionExpired: Session expired — reload the page and try again
error.connectionFailed: Connection failed. Check your internet and try again.
error.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
error.resetLinkExpired: The reset link has expired or is invalid. Request a new one from the login page.
error.resetLinkInactive: This reset link is no longer active.

success.forgotTitle: We've sent a reset link to your email.
success.forgotBody: Open the email and follow the reset link to choose a new password.
success.signupPartial: Account created. Log in to finish setting up your team.
success.signupBody: Check your email to confirm your account, then log in.
success.passwordUpdatedBody: You can continue straight into the game with your new password.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your manager account
resetPassword.linkExpiredHelp: Request a new reset link from the login page and open the email again.

setupWizard.title: Welcome to Cycling Zone
setupWizard.subtitle: Name your team to get started
setupWizard.footnote: You can change the names later under Profile & Settings

onboardingModal.title: Your team is ready — what now?
onboardingModal.subtitle: Here are the three most important things to know:

market.title: Market
market.desc: Browse all available riders and filter by stats and price. Start an auction to bring in your first rider.

auctions.title: Auctions
auctions.desc: Follow active auctions, bid on other teams' riders, and watch your own. Winners are drawn automatically.

board.title: Board
board.desc: The board judges you continuously based on team quality and results. Keep satisfaction high to avoid pressure.

onboardingTour.fallback: Tour active — couldn't find a tour target on this page.
